title: (Pwn2Own) Autel MaxiCharger AC Elite Home USB Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
description:
This vulnerability allows physically present attackers to bypass authentication on affected installations of Autel MaxiCharger AC Elite Home EV chargers. Authentication is not required to exploit this vulnerability.
The specific flaw exists within the exposed USB interface. The issue results from the lack of authentication prior to allowing access to functionality. An attacker can leverage this vulnerability to bypass authentication on the system.
timeline:
2026-03-19 - Vulnerability reported to vendor
2026-07-15 - Coordinated public release of advisory
2026-07-15  - Advisory Updated
credit: Tobias Scharnowski (@ScepticCtf), Felix Buchmann, and Kristian Covic of Fuzzware.io
